H, title I, § 1301(a)128 Stat. 2537Dec. 16, 2014“(a).—In GeneralThe Government Printing Office is hereby redesignated the Government Publishing Office.“(b).—ReferencesAny reference to the Government Printing Office in any law, rule, regulation, certificate, directive, instruction, or other official paper in force on the date of enactment of this Act [] shall be considered to refer and apply to the Government Publishing Office.”Dec. 16, 2014
